subcodes.first_line: Ever hath the glance of the loving-kindness of the All-Bountiful, the Most High, been directed towards those, both men and women, who have turned unto Him. This is the Day for the manifestation of the gems of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال طرف عنایت غنی متعال متوجه مقبلین و مقبلات بوده امروز روز ظهور جواهر وجود
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @high station of the true believer, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
